mapper.select: SELECT '200以内' as heat,case when t.200以内 is null then 0 else t.200以内 end total from (select sum(case when heat <= 200 then 1 else 0 end) as 200以内, sum(case when heat >= 200 and heat <= 300 then 1 else 0 end) as 200至300, sum(case when heat >= 300 and heat <= 400 then 1 else 0 end) as 300至400, sum(case when heat >= 400 then 1 else 0 end) as 400以上 from dietplan 1=1 ${ew.sqlSegment} ) t union all SELECT '200至300' as heat,case when t.200至300 is null then 0 else t.200至300 end total from (select sum(case when heat <= 200 then 1 else 0 end) as 200以内, sum(case when heat >= 200 and heat <= 300 then 1 else 0 end) as 200至300, sum(case when heat >= 300 and heat <= 400 then 1 else 0 end) as 300至400, sum(case when heat >= 400 then 1 else 0 end) as 400以上 from dietplan 1=1 ${ew.sqlSegment} ) t union all SELECT '300至400' as heat,case when t.300至400 is null then 0 else t.300至400 end total from (select sum(case when heat <= 200 then 1 else 0 end) as 200以内, sum(case when heat >= 200 and heat <= 300 then 1 else 0 end) as 200至300, sum(case when heat >= 300 and heat <= 400 then 1 else 0 end) as 300至400, sum(case when heat >= 400 then 1 else 0 end) as 400以上 from dietplan 1=1 ${ew.sqlSegment} ) t union all SELECT '400以上' as heat,case when t.400以上 is null then 0 else t.400以上 end total from (select sum(case when heat <= 200 then 1 else 0 end) as 200以内, sum(case when heat >= 200 and heat <= 300 then 1 else 0 end) as 200至300, sum(case when heat >= 300 and heat <= 400 then 1 else 0 end) as 300至400, sum(case when heat >= 400 then 1 else 0 end) as 400以上 from dietplan 1=1 ${ew.sqlSegment} ) t

SELECT '10以内' as protein,case when t.10以内 is null then 0 else t.10以内 end total from (select sum(case when protein <= 10 then 1 else 0 end) as 10以内, sum(case when protein >= 10 and protein <= 15 then 1 else 0 end) as 10至15, sum(case when protein >= 15 and protein <= 25 then 1 else 0 end) as 15至25, sum(case when protein >= 25 then 1 else 0 end) as 25以上 from dietplan 1=1 ${ew.sqlSegment} ) t union all SELECT '10至15' as protein,case when t.10至15 is null then 0 else t.10至15 end total from (select sum(case when protein <= 10 then 1 else 0 end) as 10以内, sum(case when protein >= 10 and protein <= 15 then 1 else 0 end) as 10至15, sum(case when protein >= 15 and protein <= 25 then 1 else 0 end) as 15至25, sum(case when protein >= 25 then 1 else 0 end) as 25以上 from dietplan 1=1 ${ew.sqlSegment} ) t union all SELECT '15至25' as protein,case when t.15至25 is null then 0 else t.15至25 end total from (select sum(case when protein <= 10 then 1 else 0 end) as 10以内, sum(case when protein >= 10 and protein <= 15 then 1 else 0 end) as 10至15, sum(case when protein >= 15 and protein <= 25 then 1 else 0 end) as 15至25, sum(case when protein >= 25 then 1 else 0 end) as 25以上 from dietplan 1=1 ${ew.sqlSegment} ) t union all SELECT '25以上' as protein,case when t.25以上 is null then 0 else t.25以上 end total from (select sum(case when protein <= 10 then 1 else 0 end) as 10以内, sum(case when protein >= 10 and protein <= 15 then 1 else 0 end) as 10至15, sum(case when protein >= 15 and protein <= 25 then 1 else 0 end) as 15至25, sum(case when protein >= 25 then 1 else 0 end) as 25以上 from dietplan 1=1 ${ew.sqlSegment} ) t

SELECT '20以内' as fat,case when t.20以内 is null then 0 else t.20以内 end total from (select sum(case when fat <= 20 then 1 else 0 end) as 20以内, sum(case when fat >= 20 and fat <= 30 then 1 else 0 end) as 20至30, sum(case when fat >= 30 and fat <= 40 then 1 else 0 end) as 30至40, sum(case when fat >= 40 then 1 else 0 end) as 40以上 from dietplan 1=1 ${ew.sqlSegment} ) t union all SELECT '20至30' as fat,case when t.20至30 is null then 0 else t.20至30 end total from (select sum(case when fat <= 20 then 1 else 0 end) as 20以内, sum(case when fat >= 20 and fat <= 30 then 1 else 0 end) as 20至30, sum(case when fat >= 30 and fat <= 40 then 1 else 0 end) as 30至40, sum(case when fat >= 40 then 1 else 0 end) as 40以上 from dietplan 1=1 ${ew.sqlSegment} ) t union all SELECT '30至40' as fat,case when t.30至40 is null then 0 else t.30至40 end total from (select sum(case when fat <= 20 then 1 else 0 end) as 20以内, sum(case when fat >= 20 and fat <= 30 then 1 else 0 end) as 20至30, sum(case when fat >= 30 and fat <= 40 then 1 else 0 end) as 30至40, sum(case when fat >= 40 then 1 else 0 end) as 40以上 from dietplan 1=1 ${ew.sqlSegment} ) t union all SELECT '40以上' as fat,case when t.40以上 is null then 0 else t.40以上 end total from (select sum(case when fat <= 20 then 1 else 0 end) as 20以内, sum(case when fat >= 20 and fat <= 30 then 1 else 0 end) as 20至30, sum(case when fat >= 30 and fat <= 40 then 1 else 0 end) as 30至40, sum(case when fat >= 40 then 1 else 0 end) as 40以上 from dietplan 1=1 ${ew.sqlSegment} ) t

SELECT '20以内' as carbohydrate,case when t.20以内 is null then 0 else t.20以内 end total from (select sum(case when carbohydrate <= 20 then 1 else 0 end) as 20以内, sum(case when carbohydrate >= 20 and carbohydrate <= 30 then 1 else 0 end) as 20至30, sum(case when carbohydrate >= 30 and carbohydrate <= 40 then 1 else 0 end) as 30至40, sum(case when carbohydrate >= 40 then 1 else 0 end) as 40以上 from dietplan 1=1 ${ew.sqlSegment} ) t union all SELECT '20至30' as carbohydrate,case when t.20至30 is null then 0 else t.20至30 end total from (select sum(case when carbohydrate <= 20 then 1 else 0 end) as 20以内, sum(case when carbohydrate >= 20 and carbohydrate <= 30 then 1 else 0 end) as 20至30, sum(case when carbohydrate >= 30 and carbohydrate <= 40 then 1 else 0 end) as 30至40, sum(case when carbohydrate >= 40 then 1 else 0 end) as 40以上 from dietplan 1=1 ${ew.sqlSegment} ) t union all SELECT '30至40' as carbohydrate,case when t.30至40 is null then 0 else t.30至40 end total from (select sum(case when carbohydrate <= 20 then 1 else 0 end) as 20以内, sum(case when carbohydrate >= 20 and carbohydrate <= 30 then 1 else 0 end) as 20至30, sum(case when carbohydrate >= 30 and carbohydrate <= 40 then 1 else 0 end) as 30至40, sum(case when carbohydrate >= 40 then 1 else 0 end) as 40以上 from dietplan 1=1 ${ew.sqlSegment} ) t union all SELECT '40以上' as carbohydrate,case when t.40以上 is null then 0 else t.40以上 end total from (select sum(case when carbohydrate <= 20 then 1 else 0 end) as 20以内, sum(case when carbohydrate >= 20 and carbohydrate <= 30 then 1 else 0 end) as 20至30, sum(case when carbohydrate >= 30 and carbohydrate <= 40 then 1 else 0 end) as 30至40, sum(case when carbohydrate >= 40 then 1 else 0 end) as 40以上 from dietplan 1=1 ${ew.sqlSegment} ) t
